name: Coffee Liqueur Pecan Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. Beat the eggs slightly and add the corn syrup, vanilla, and pecan halves; blend well.
2. Pour the mixture into an unbaked pie shell.
3. Bake in a preheated 325-degree oven for 45 minutes.
4. Cool on a wire rack.
5. To make the topping, mix the whipping cream and coffee liqueur until peaks form.
6. Serve immediately, placing some of the cream on each slice of pie.
